understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place each selectable piece onto a goal tile (marked '+') so that all goal tiles are occupied simultaneously, completing each level and ultimately the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Selectable pieces are individual objects on a grid. Clicking on a piece switches the current selection to that piece (the 'selected piece'). The selected piece can be moved with arrow-key actions (MOVE_LEFT, etc.). Walls or obstacles block movement. Only one piece is controlled at a time, and pieces cannot occupy the same cell. Each level has a finite step budget, requiring efficient moves to cover all goals.
